political.s: YMCA of the USA does not make direct PAC contributions or endorse candidates, adhering to 501(c)(3) restrictions on political campaign activity. The organization advocates for legislation aligned with its mission and engages public officials on policy issues, maintaining a nonpartisan stance.

charity.s: YMCA serves 16.9 million people through a federated nonprofit structure with hundreds of local associations providing programs focused on youth development, healthy living, and social responsibility. Local YMCAs provide millions in annual financial assistance for memberships and programs for those unable to pay.
charity.amt: Estimated $1-2+ billion in combined annual charitable support across network
charity.focus: Youth development, health/fitness, childcare, community services, financial assistance

environment.s: YMCA has adopted a Vision 2030 sustainability strategy with goals including 50% greenhouse gas emissions reduction by 2050, renewable energy initiatives, waste reduction programs, and youth environmental education. Several YMCAs have achieved LEED certification and partnered with environmental organizations.

labor.s: YMCA employee handbooks show standard workplace policies including anti-discrimination, anti-harassment, and family leave provisions. Labor records indicate some YMCA associations have faced political activity concerns and complaints about potential misuse of facilities, though widespread systematic labor violations are not documented.

dei.s: YMCA has made significant commitments to diversity, equity, inclusion and belonging through DEI committees, staff training, Boys and Young Men of Color initiatives, and leadership development programs focused on dismantling systemic barriers. Local associations emphasize welcoming all regardless of race, gender, sexual orientation, ability, or income.

animals.s: Not applicable - YMCA is a community services organization that does not conduct animal testing or use animals in its programs.

guns.s: Not applicable - YMCA is a nonprofit community services organization that does not manufacture, sell, or distribute firearms.

privacy.s: YMCA maintains privacy policies protecting member data with encryption for financial transactions and restricted staff access. However, policies vary across local associations and use of cookies/analytics is standard. Data retention and third-party sharing practices show reasonable but not exceptional privacy protections.

execPay.s: YMCA of the USA CEO compensation averages $134K-$330K depending on source, with average executive compensation around $237K annually. For 2021, CEO Kevin Washington earned $855,104. Executive pay varies significantly by location and organization size, with board oversight of compensation.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
